'''Hirrtu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] communications officer, tail gunner and cook for the ''[[Boneyard Rendezvous]]''. He was a typical light green Rodian with the exceptions of several splotches of blue he painted on every fifth scale of his body. He most likely died when the ''Boneyard'' was destroyed by [[Ben Skywalker]] onboard a [[Sith Meditation Sphere]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
